docs.title: kamino-py
docs.text:
A small, typed Python client for the Kamino Finance public API — read-only access to Solana DeFi data: lending markets, reserves, liquidity vaults (KVaults), oracle prices, and staking yields.

  • Synchronous (KaminoClient) and asynchronous (AsyncKaminoClient) clients, built on httpx.
  • Typed pydantic v2 models with extra="allow", so new API fields never break your code.
  • High-precision numeric values are preserved as exact strings (no float rounding).
  • Ships with py.typed; works on Python 3.9–3.13.
  • No API key required for the endpoints covered here.

Scope: This is a v1 read-only data layer. It does not build or sign transactions.

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
pip install kamino-py

The import name is kamino:

from kamino import KaminoClient

docs.title: Quickstart
docs.text:
from kamino import KaminoClient

with KaminoClient() as client:
    # All Kamino lending markets
    markets = client.get_markets()
    primary = next(m for m in markets if m.is_primary)
    print(primary.name, primary.lending_market)

    # Reserve metrics (APYs, supply/borrow) for the primary market
    for reserve in client.get_reserve_metrics(primary.lending_market):
        print(f"{reserve.liquidity_token}: supply {reserve.supply_apy}  borrow {reserve.borrow_apy}")

    # Oracle prices
    for price in client.get_oracle_prices()[:5]:
        print(price.name, price.price)

docs.title: Async
docs.text:
import asyncio
from kamino import AsyncKaminoClient


async def main():
    async with AsyncKaminoClient() as client:
        vaults = await client.get_vaults()
        print(f"{len(vaults)} vaults")
        if vaults:
            metrics = await client.get_vault_metrics(vaults[0].address)
            print("APY (30d):", metrics.apy_30d)


asyncio.run(main())

docs.title: Covered endpoints
docs.text:
All endpoints were discovered from the live Kamino API (the OpenAPI spec at https://api.kamino.finance/openapi/json) and validated against live responses. The base URL is https://api.kamino.finance (configurable via KaminoClient(base_url=...)).

Client method HTTP endpoint Returns get_markets(program_id=None) GET /v2/kamino-market list[MarketConfig] get_market(pubkey, program_id=None) GET /v2/kamino-market/{pubkey} MarketConfig get_reserve_metrics(market_pubkey) GET /kamino-market/{pubkey}/reserves/metrics list[ReserveMetrics] get_vaults() GET /kvaults/vaults list[Vault] get_vault(pubkey) GET /kvaults/vaults/{pubkey} Vault get_vault_metrics(pubkey) GET /kvaults/vaults/{pubkey}/metrics KvaultMetrics get_oracle_prices(markets="main") GET /oracles/prices list[OraclePrice] get_staking_yields() GET /v2/staking-yields list[StakingYield]

get_oracle_prices accepts a markets argument that the API defines as an enum: "main" (the default — assets in the main market) or "all" (assets across every public KLend market). Other values are rejected by the API with HTTP 400.

The full public API exposes many more endpoints (user positions, rewards, historical metrics, transaction building, etc.); see the official API reference. This v1 client deliberately covers the core read-only data surface.

docs.title: Numeric values
docs.text:
The Kamino API returns monetary and rate values as JSON strings to preserve arbitrary precision (e.g. "331207.0453075084101040319913000775642331"). This client keeps them as str to avoid float rounding. Convert when you need arithmetic:

from decimal import Decimal

reserve = client.get_reserve_metrics(primary.lending_market)[0]
borrow_apy = Decimal(reserve.borrow_apy)

docs.title: Error handling
docs.text:
Non-success HTTP responses raise KaminoAPIError with .status_code and .response_text:

from kamino import KaminoClient, KaminoAPIError

try:
    with KaminoClient() as client:
        client.get_market("not-a-real-pubkey")
except KaminoAPIError as e:
    print(e.status_code, e)

docs.title: Configuration
docs.text:
KaminoClient(
    base_url="https://api.kamino.finance",  # override for a proxy/staging host
    timeout=30.0,                            # request timeout in seconds
    http_client=my_httpx_client,             # bring your own httpx.Client
)

docs.title: Development
docs.text:
pip install -e ".[dev]"
ruff check .
mypy
pytest                 # unit tests (live integration tests deselected)
pytest -m integration  # run the live integration test against the real API

See CONTRIBUTING.md.

docs.title: License
docs.text: MIT

docs.title: kamino
docs.text:
kamino-py: a typed Python client for the Kamino Finance public API.

Provides synchronous (:class:KaminoClient) and asynchronous (:class:AsyncKaminoClient) clients for read-only access to Kamino Finance data on Solana: lending markets, reserves, liquidity vaults, oracle prices, and staking yields.

docs.title: AsyncKaminoClient
docs.text:
Asynchronous client for the Kamino Finance public API.

Mirrors :class:KaminoClient but exposes coroutine methods and wraps an :class:httpx.AsyncClient.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default base_url str

API base URL. Defaults to https://api.kamino.finance. Any trailing slash is stripped.

DEFAULT_BASE_URL timeout float

Request timeout in seconds. Defaults to 30.

DEFAULT_TIMEOUT http_client Optional[AsyncClient]

An optional pre-configured :class:httpx.AsyncClient. When provided, the caller is responsible for closing it.

None

Use as an async context manager::

async with AsyncKaminoClient() as client:
    markets = await client.get_markets()

docs.title: aclose() async
docs.text: Close the underlying async HTTP client if owned by this instance.

docs.title: get_markets(*, program_id=None) async
docs.text:
Get the configuration of all Kamino lending markets.

Calls GET /v2/kamino-market. See :meth:KaminoClient.get_markets.

docs.title: get_market(pubkey, *, program_id=None) async
docs.text:
Get a single lending market config.

Calls GET /v2/kamino-market/{pubkey}. See :meth:KaminoClient.get_market.

docs.title: get_reserve_metrics(market_pubkey) async
docs.text:
Get current metrics for all reserves in a lending market.

Calls GET /kamino-market/{pubkey}/reserves/metrics. See :meth:KaminoClient.get_reserve_metrics.

docs.title: get_vaults() async
docs.text:
Get all Kamino liquidity vaults (KVaults).

Calls GET /kvaults/vaults. See :meth:KaminoClient.get_vaults.

docs.title: get_vault(pubkey) async
docs.text:
Get a single Kamino liquidity vault by address.

Calls GET /kvaults/vaults/{pubkey}. See :meth:KaminoClient.get_vault.

docs.title: get_vault_metrics(pubkey) async
docs.text:
Get current metrics for a vault.

Calls GET /kvaults/vaults/{pubkey}/metrics. See :meth:KaminoClient.get_vault_metrics.

docs.title: get_oracle_prices(*, markets='main') async
docs.text:
Get Kamino oracle prices.

Calls GET /oracles/prices. The markets argument selects the market set: "main" (default) or "all". See :meth:KaminoClient.get_oracle_prices.

docs.title: get_staking_yields() async
docs.text:
Get staking yields for supported tokens.

Calls GET /v2/staking-yields. See :meth:KaminoClient.get_staking_yields.

docs.title: KaminoClient
docs.text:
Synchronous client for the Kamino Finance public API.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default base_url str

API base URL. Defaults to https://api.kamino.finance. Any trailing slash is stripped.

DEFAULT_BASE_URL timeout float

Request timeout in seconds. Defaults to 30.

DEFAULT_TIMEOUT http_client Optional[Client]

An optional pre-configured :class:httpx.Client. When provided, the caller is responsible for closing it; otherwise the client manages its own and closes it on :meth:close.

None

The client is safe to use as a context manager::

with KaminoClient() as client:
    markets = client.get_markets()

docs.title: close()
docs.text: Close the underlying HTTP client if it is owned by this instance.

docs.title: get_markets(*, program_id=None)
docs.text:
Get the configuration of all Kamino lending markets.

Calls GET /v2/kamino-market.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default program_id Optional[str]

Optionally filter markets by KLend program id.

None

Returns:

Type Description list[MarketConfig]

A list of :class:~kamino.models.MarketConfig.

docs.title: get_market(pubkey, *, program_id=None)
docs.text:
Get the configuration of a single Kamino lending market.

Calls GET /v2/kamino-market/{pubkey}.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default pubkey str

Base58 public key of the lending market.

required program_id Optional[str]

Optionally specify the KLend program id.

None

Returns:

Name Type Description A MarketConfig

class:~kamino.models.MarketConfig.

docs.title: get_reserve_metrics(market_pubkey)
docs.text:
Get current metrics for all reserves in a lending market.

Calls GET /kamino-market/{pubkey}/reserves/metrics.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default market_pubkey str

Base58 public key of the lending market.

required

Returns:

Type Description list[ReserveMetrics]

A list of :class:~kamino.models.ReserveMetrics.

docs.title: get_vaults()
docs.text:
Get all Kamino liquidity vaults (KVaults).

Calls GET /kvaults/vaults.

Returns:

Type Description list[Vault]

A list of :class:~kamino.models.Vault.

docs.title: get_vault(pubkey)
docs.text:
Get a single Kamino liquidity vault by its address.

Calls GET /kvaults/vaults/{pubkey}.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default pubkey str

Base58 public key of the vault.

required

Returns:

Name Type Description A Vault

class:~kamino.models.Vault.

docs.title: get_vault_metrics(pubkey)
docs.text:
Get current metrics (APYs, balances, fees) for a vault.

Calls GET /kvaults/vaults/{pubkey}/metrics.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default pubkey str

Base58 public key of the vault.

required

Returns:

Name Type Description A KvaultMetrics

class:~kamino.models.KvaultMetrics.

docs.title: get_oracle_prices(*, markets='main')
docs.text:
Get Kamino oracle prices.

Calls GET /oracles/prices.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default markets Literal['main', 'all']

Which market set to query. "main" (the default) returns oracle prices for assets in the main market; "all" returns prices for assets across all public KLend markets. The API only accepts these two values (passing anything else returns HTTP 400).

'main'

Returns:

Type Description list[OraclePrice]

A list of :class:~kamino.models.OraclePrice.

docs.title: get_staking_yields()
docs.text:
Get staking yields for supported tokens.

Calls GET /v2/staking-yields.

Returns:

Type Description list[StakingYield]

A list of :class:~kamino.models.StakingYield.

docs.title: KaminoAPIError
docs.text:
Bases: KaminoError

Raised when the Kamino API returns a non-success HTTP status.

Attributes:

Name Type Description status_code

The HTTP status code returned by the API.

response_text

The raw response body, when available.

docs.title: KaminoError
docs.text:
Bases: Exception

Base class for all errors raised by kamino-py.

docs.title: KaminoModel
docs.text:
Bases: BaseModel

Base model shared by all Kamino response models.

Configures pydantic to accept unknown fields (forward compatibility), populate fields by either alias or attribute name, and keep extra fields accessible via :attr:~pydantic.BaseModel.model_extra.

docs.title: KvaultMetrics
docs.text:
Bases: KaminoModel

Current metrics for a Kamino liquidity vault (KVault).

Returned by GET /kvaults/vaults/{pubkey}/metrics.

All APY and amount fields are high-precision decimal strings. Only the most commonly used fields are declared explicitly; any additional fields returned by the API remain available via :attr:~pydantic.BaseModel.model_extra.

Attributes:

Name Type Description apy Optional[str]

Annualized percentage yield (decimal string).

apy_24h Optional[str]

Trailing 24-hour APY (decimal string).

apy_7d Optional[str]

Trailing 7-day APY (decimal string).

apy_30d Optional[str]

Trailing 30-day APY (decimal string).

apy_90d Optional[str]

Trailing 90-day APY (decimal string).

apy_365d Optional[str]

Trailing 365-day APY (decimal string).

token_price Optional[str]

Underlying token price in USD (decimal string).

share_price Optional[str]

Vault share price (decimal string).

tokens_available Optional[str]

Idle tokens available in the vault (decimal string).

tokens_invested Optional[str]

Tokens currently deployed in strategies (decimal string).

number_of_holders Optional[int]

Number of distinct vault share holders.

docs.title: MarketConfig
docs.text:
Bases: KaminoModel

Configuration for a single Kamino lending market.

Returned by GET /v2/kamino-market (as a list) and GET /v2/kamino-market/{pubkey} (single).

Attributes:

Name Type Description name Optional[str]

Human-readable market name (e.g. "Main Market").

lending_market Optional[str]

Base58 public key of the lending market account.

is_primary Optional[bool]

Whether this is the protocol's primary market.

description Optional[str]

Free-form description of the market.

lookup_table Optional[str]

Base58 address of the market's address lookup table.

is_curated Optional[bool]

Whether the market is a curated (third-party) market.

docs.title: OraclePrice
docs.text:
Bases: KaminoModel

A single oracle price entry.

Returned by GET /oracles/prices (as a list when no markets filter is applied).

Attributes:

Name Type Description mint Optional[str]

Base58 mint address of the priced token.

name Optional[str]

Token symbol (e.g. "EURC").

price Optional[str]

Token price as a high-precision decimal string.

max_age_in_seconds Optional[str]

Maximum acceptable staleness of the price, in seconds (string).

timestamp Optional[str]

Unix timestamp of the price observation, as a string.

docs.title: ReserveMetrics
docs.text:
Bases: KaminoModel

Current metrics for a single reserve within a lending market.

Returned by GET /kamino-market/{pubkey}/reserves/metrics (as a list).

Numeric values are high-precision decimal strings as provided by the API.

Attributes:

Name Type Description reserve Optional[str]

Base58 public key of the reserve account.

liquidity_token Optional[str]

Symbol of the reserve's liquidity token (e.g. "USDC").

liquidity_token_mint Optional[str]

Base58 mint address of the liquidity token.

max_ltv Optional[str]

Maximum loan-to-value ratio for the reserve, as a decimal string.

borrow_apy Optional[str]

Current borrow APY, as a decimal string (e.g. "0.04075").

supply_apy Optional[str]

Current supply APY, as a decimal string.

total_supply Optional[str]

Total supplied amount in token units, as a decimal string.

total_borrow Optional[str]

Total borrowed amount in token units, as a decimal string.

total_supply_usd Optional[str]

Total supplied value in USD, as a decimal string.

total_borrow_usd Optional[str]

Total borrowed value in USD, as a decimal string.

docs.title: StakingYield
docs.text:
Bases: KaminoModel

Staking yield for a single token mint.

Returned by GET /v2/staking-yields (as a list).

Attributes:

Name Type Description apy Optional[str]

Annualized staking yield, as a decimal string.

token_mint Optional[str]

Base58 mint address of the staked token.

docs.title: Vault
docs.text:
Bases: KaminoModel

A Kamino liquidity vault (KVault).

Returned by GET /kvaults/vaults (as a list) and GET /kvaults/vaults/{pubkey} (single).

Attributes:

Name Type Description address Optional[str]

Base58 public key of the vault.

program_id Optional[str]

Base58 program id that owns the vault.

state Optional[dict[str, Any]]

Raw on-chain vault state object as returned by the API. The exact shape is preserved as a dict to avoid coupling to internal layout.
